author: gb9t
content: Iteration 50 (milestone): mtd/nand-raw.md committed (ef261b8, 254 lines). Raw NAND flash — every embedded boot+rootfs flash on eMMC-less boards. ~97K LOC. Grsec: parallel concern to SPI-NOR BIOS-flash but for embedded boot. Defenses: ONFI/JEDEC param-page CRC validation (closes CVE-2019-16089-class), 5-byte ID match strict, ECC algorithm validated against chip-requirement (closes silent-fallback-to-weaker-ECC class), factory-bad-marker preservation, chip-erase opcode refused, wear-leveling delegated to UBI. Session totals: 50 vendor-driver Tier-3 docs / ~2.95M upstream LOC. Coverage: NICs ×11, WiFi ×3, GPU ×7, storage HBA ×5, storage targets ×2, RDMA ×3, SmartNIC/DPU ×2, USB ×2, virtualization ×4, IOMMU ×2, audio, link aggregation, automotive/CAN, laptop platforms, serial UART, SPI-NOR, NAND. Next iteration: drivers/firmware/qcom_scm (Qualcomm Secure Channel Manager — every Snapdragon SoC root-of-trust).
